Home Research Teaching

Coauthors

I have had the pleasure of working with the following wonderful people:

Xinxin Chen, Loïc de Raphélis, Jian Ding, Yichao Huang, Yiyang Jiang, Shuwen Lai, Pascal Maillard, Yan-Xia Ren, Longmin Wang.

Papers and Preprints

(listed in reverse chronological order of their first posting date on arXiv.)

  1. Atypical Decay Rates for Atypical Heights in Random Recursive Trees

    with Xinxin Chen

    arxiv, 2026+

    arXiv slides

  2. Minimum-Weight Path in a Sparse Erdős--Rényi Graph with Signed Weights

    with Pascal Maillard

    arxiv, 2025+

    arXiv

  3. Left tail of the subcritical derivative martingale in a branching Wiener process

    with Xinxin Chen and Yichao Huang

    arxiv, 2025+

    arXiv

  4. Exponential moments of truncated branching random walk martingales

    with Pascal Maillard

    Electron. J. Probab., 2025

    journal arXiv

  5. Branching Brownian motion conditioned on large level sets

    with Xinxin Chen

    arxiv, 2024+

    arXiv slides

  6. Multifractal spectrum of branching random walks on free groups

    with Shuwen Lai and Longmin Wang

    arxiv, 2024+

    arXiv slides

  7. Branching random walk conditioned on large martingale limit

    with Xinxin Chen and Loïc de Raphélis

    Accepted in Ann. Inst. H. Poincaré Probab. Statist., 2024+

    arXiv slides

  8. From 0 to 3: Intermediate phases between normal and anomalous spreading of two-type branching Brownian motion

    with Yan-Xia Ren

    arxiv, 2023+

    arXiv poster slides

  9. Double jump in the maximum of two-type reducible branching Brownian motion

    with Yan-Xia Ren

    Accepted in Ann. Inst. H. Poincaré Probab. Statist., 2023+

    arXiv poster slides

  10. Shotgun threshold for sparse Erdős–Rényi graphs

    with Jian Ding and Yiyang Jiang

    IEEE Transactions on Information Theory, 2023

    journal arXiv poster slides
